title: Smoking, erectile dysfunction, and 11 teas to the rescue
description: Medium grandiflorum teas have been gaining attention for their potential benefits in addressing erectile dysfunction. The tea is rich in properties and constituents that may help alleviate symptoms. It contains flavonoids, which are plant compounds that have been shown to improve blood flow to the genital area, as well as relax smooth muscle and increase nitric oxide production, a key player in erectile function.
